summary: GET /compose, /compose/runtimes, /compose/orchestrator, and /api/library all returned 200. Live route bundles and JSON support the compose headings, runtimes faculty, orchestrator primary_runtime default option, and claude-code-runtime library entry. The runtimes slice failed because the live app data does not include an Agent SDK runtime peer, so /compose/runtimes cannot list Claude Code alongside Agent SDK, Codex, and Gemini.
steps: curl GET http://127.0.0.1:7777/compose and verify HTTP 200
curl GET http://127.0.0.1:7777/_next/static/chunks/app/compose/page.js and assert it contains 'Agent faculties', 'Dev faculties', and 'Runtimes'
curl GET http://127.0.0.1:7777/compose/runtimes and verify HTTP 200
curl GET http://127.0.0.1:7777/api/library and inspect live runtimes entries
curl GET http://127.0.0.1:7777/_next/static/chunks/app/compose/%5Bfaculty%5D/page.js and assert it contains 'primary_runtime' and 'Default — Claude Code runtime'
curl GET http://127.0.0.1:7777/api/compositions and confirm the active default composition has no globalConfig.primary_runtime, which maps to the default selected option

failures.expected: Page contains a 'Claude Code runtime' fitting listed alongside Agent SDK / Codex / Gemini runtimes
failures.actual: Live runtime entries from /api/library are only 'Claude Code runtime', 'Codex runtime', and 'Gemini runtime'; no Agent SDK runtime entry is present, so the required peer set is incomplete
